description: Wrap your little one in comfort and love with our Unisex Baby Sleepsuit Set – the perfect combination of style, softness, and practicality. This 2-pack set features two heartwarming designs with “I ❤️ Mummy” and “I ❤️ Daddy” prints, making them a charming addition to your baby’s everyday wardrobe. Crafted from breathable 100% cotton, these footed rompers are designed to keep your baby warm and cosy during naps or nighttime sleep. The full-length design with covered feet ensures head-to-toe comfort, while the convenient popper buttons make dressing and diaper changes a breeze – even in the middle of the night. Suitable for both boys and girls, and available in sizes from Preemie (P) to 24 months, this gender-neutral sleepsuit set is a thoughtful baby shower gift and a daily essential for new parents.
